title: Domain pack evidence_types.yaml loader proof (NM-5 continuation)
problem: Ticket-113 proved scoring.yaml drives score reconciliation. The creativity pack still has eight other declarative files not loaded at runtime. NM-5 requires incremental proof that the domain-pack abstraction generalizes beyond ontology, aliases, and scoring before claiming domain-generality.
acceptance_criteria: evidence_types.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
At least one existing consumer (e.g. claim validator or repositories) reads pack-defined evidence type labels instead of a hardcoded duplicate.
Temp-pack unit test proves different evidence type list changes validation or display behavior.
Golden and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
non_goals: No loading all remaining pack files in one ticket.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
No public export or site changes.
rollback_plan: Revert evidence_types loader wiring; restore inline evidence type constants.
